## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new industry page pipeline and discuss performance and experimentation.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The automated industry page pipeline is live, but a data transfer bug is blocking scale. Tanmay will review the first page to validate the output before a full rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [A/B test approved: Add TLDRs to 25 underperforming articles to test if summaries improve SERP visibility and LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [LLM traffic is highly engaged (higher time-on-page) but under-tracked. The Scrunch prompt list will be expanded from 54 to match the content library.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [A new SEO forecasting model will be built to project traffic growth from publishing volume, providing a "good, better, best" scenario.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

## Topics

### Industry Page Pipeline

  - [The first automated industry page is published, but a pipeline bug is blocking scale by preventing content from transferring to Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Tanmay's Feedback & Decisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**"Real-time" keyword:** Remove from all generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [**Use Cases link:** Update text to "Explore Articles" until dedicated use case pages exist.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Industry hub page:** Create a central `/industries` page to list all sub-pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Content & Design Adjustments:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Logos:** Use static images for pillar industries (e.g., Healthcare) instead of dynamic, sub-category logos to simplify the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Quotes:** Pull from a pre-curated list of case study quotes.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Connectors:** Generate descriptions via pipeline research.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Next Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Tanmay:** Review the live page and provide final feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Carrie:** Fix the pipeline bug and implement Tanmay's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Carrie & Tanmay:** Merge their industry lists (\~60 and \~100+ pages) to create a master list for prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Performance & Tracking

  - [**SEO Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [SERP visibility for Airtable pages is improving.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [CTR is rising, and traffic is stable week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Content clusters for the Flex product and security are showing strong momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Traffic:** ChatGPT is the top source, followed by Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Engagement:** LLM users are highly engaged (higher time-on-page) and represent \~10% of all citations.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Tracking Gap:** The Scrunch prompt list is limited to 54, providing an incomplete view of performance.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Action Items:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Jakub:** Build an SEO forecasting model to project traffic growth from publishing volume.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Carrie:** Expand the Scrunch prompt list to match the content library.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Experimentation: TLDRs

  - [**Hypothesis:** Adding a TLDR (Too Long; Didn't Read) summary improves SERP visibility and LLM citation rates.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [**Experiment Design:**](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [**Test Group:** 25 articles with significant Ahrefs position drops since April.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [**Control Group:** 25 similar articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [**Action:** Add a TLDR to the top of each test article.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Monitor keyword positions and Scrunch visibility for both groups.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The experiment isolates the TLDR variable by making no other content changes. A CMS limitation will auto-update the publish date, but this is acceptable as a secondary variable.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Future Focus: AI Product

  - [Airbyte is launching an AI data product, with a strategy sprint kicking off in about a week.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [This creates new opportunities for content and marketing support, similar to work for other GrowthX clients (e.g., Augment).](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tanmay:** Review the live industry page and provide final feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Fix the pipeline bug and implement Tanmay's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Carrie & Tanmay:** Merge their industry lists to create a master prioritization list.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Expand the Scrunch prompt list to match the content library.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Build the SEO forecasting model and share the "good, better, best" traffic projections.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:** Execute the TLDR experiment on 25 articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/KDKeBaysFZRUHKxrBR4yzxq5MsKnLbmZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
